title: Fix archive release ordering

tasks.title: Make adv_change_archive complete release gate before archive status.
tasks.verification: RED: targeted archive Phase 9 test failed because release gate signal was not fired. GREEN: pnpm test -- src/tools/change.archive-phase9.test.ts passed after adv_change_archive completes the release gate after successful Phase 9 finalization and before archived status save.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added archive-local release gate completion after successful Phase 9 finalization and before archived status transition. The helper signals gateCompletedSignal with completedBy `adv-archive`, polls workflow release gate state until done/stuck, blocks archive status/cleanup if confirmation fails, and returns releaseGate metadata. Added regression test proving release signal fires after finalization and before store.changes.save; blocked finalization does not signal release.
tasks.notes: Completed release-gate-before-archive ordering. Targeted archive Phase 9 test passes.

attempts.error: RED test failure: release gate signal was not fired by adv_change_archive after finalization.
attempts.diagnosis: Archive finalization previously returned success and then archived status without recording the release gate.
attempts.fix_tried: Implemented completeReleaseGateAfterFinalization using gateCompletedSignal and workflow polling before status save.

tasks.title: Add completed-workflow / existing-bundle release metadata reconciliation.
tasks.verification: RED: no-worktree existing-bundle retry tests failed because adv_change_archive still required worktreePath; recovery-writer test failed because saveRecoveredGateCompletion used store.changes.save. GREEN: pnpm test -- src/tools/change.archive-phase9.test.ts src/tools/_recovery-writers.test.ts passed after main-checkout evidence verification and disk-direct release-gate recovery.
tasks.implementation_summary: Moved existing-bundle detection before worktreePath enforcement so already-written bundles can be recovered without rematerializing the change worktree. Added main-checkout structural evidence verification for no-worktree retry: direct mode checks change branch reachability and default-branch push; PR mode checks change branch push. Added release gate disk-projection recovery when the workflow is already completed, and changed saveRecoveredGateCompletion to use disk-direct saveChange so archived/completed workflow repair does not call Temporal-backed store.changes.save. Skips archive-status save when status is already archived.
tasks.notes: Completed retry/reconciliation path. Targeted archive Phase 9 and recovery-writer tests pass.

attempts.error: RED tests: no-worktree existing-bundle retry still required worktreePath; saveRecoveredGateCompletion persisted via store.changes.save.
attempts.diagnosis: Archive retry was ordered around fresh worktree finalization, and gate recovery reused the Temporal-backed save path that fails for completed workflows.
attempts.fix_tried: Allow existing-bundle no-worktree recovery with structural main-checkout evidence; add disk-direct release gate recovery writer path.

tasks.title: Update archive command/report wayfinding and ordering docs.
tasks.verification: RED: archive asset/tool-output tests failed because docs still instructed a separate release gate call and tool output lacked continueFrom. GREEN: pnpm test -- src/adv-autonomy-quality-assets.test.ts src/tools/change.archive-phase9.test.ts passed after updating archive docs, sign-off voice, and tool continueFrom output.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated archive sign-off docs so adv_change_archive phase9:run owns Phase 9 and release-gate recording; removed the normal-path instruction to call adv_gate_complete release after finalization. Added terminal-neutral `Continue from: {mainCheckout} ({default-branch})` guidance to archive report and cleanup/completion docs. Added tool output `continueFrom` derived from finalization main checkout/default branch. Updated ADV sign-off voice and command voice standard to match the archive-owned release ordering.
tasks.notes: Completed archive wayfinding and ordering docs/report. Targeted asset/tool-output tests pass.

attempts.error: RED tests: adv-archive docs did not mention archive-owned release gate recording or Continue from main/default checkout; adv_change_archive output lacked continueFrom.
attempts.diagnosis: User-facing archive instructions still reflected the old post-finalization release gate call and lacked terminal-neutral post-cleanup wayfinding.
attempts.fix_tried: Updated adv-archive command docs, ADV sign-off voice, command voice standard, and archive tool output continueFrom metadata.

tasks.title: Run final verification and coordination checks.
tasks.verification: Harden remediation verified: added JSDoc for release-evidence/recovery orchestration functions and ran pnpm run check successfully.
tasks.notes: Final verification passed. `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, full `pnpm test`, and `adv_change_validate strict:true` passed. Validation warning NO_DELTAS is expected for this bug-fix/no-spec-delta change.

error_recovery.last_error: pnpm run check initially failed at prettier --check src/: style issues in src/adv-autonomy-quality-assets.test.ts, src/tools/change.archive-phase9.test.ts, src/tools/change.ts
error_recovery.next_strategy: Resolved by formatter; no further retry needed.

attempts.error: pnpm run check failed at prettier --check src/: style issues in 3 touched files.
attempts.diagnosis: Implementation edits were not Prettier-formatted; typecheck and lint completed before format check.
attempts.fix_tried: Ran pnpm run format, then reran pnpm run check, pnpm run build, full pnpm test, and adv_change_validate strict:true.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal via chat: `approve`; added consideration to include post-archive return-to-base/trunk guidance in discovery/design.

discovery.approval_evidence: User approved agreement via chat: `approve`. Discovery scoped release-gate/archive ordering, retry, cleanup, and post-archive main-checkout wayfinding constraints.

design.approval_evidence: Design validator returned PASS_WITH_NOTES. Incorporated required adjustments: poll for release gate done before archive status, do not reuse completeGateViaRecovery for archived retry, use completedBy adv-archive, and keep Warp guidance optional.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep plan via chat: `approve`. Task graph covers archive release ordering, retry reconciliation, post-archive wayfinding, and final verification.

execution.approval_evidence: All four planned tasks are done. Verification passed: pnpm run check, pnpm run build, full pnpm test, and adv_change_validate strict:true. Working tree clean at b35a5444e5c8cac8bea6780c0096adc1389d1f4d.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work via chat: `accept`. Review verdict APPROVED; executive summary and contract review matrix persisted; verification passed: targeted archive recovery tests, pnpm run check, pnpm run build, full pnpm test, adv_change_validate strict:true with expected NO_DELTAS.

items.text: `adv_change_archive phase9:"run"` completes an auto-managed change with both `change.status === "archived"` and `gates.release.status === "done"`.
Release completion is recorded only after Phase 9 reachability/push evidence exists; missing merge or missing push still blocks.
Retrying archive after a completed workflow or already-written archive bundle can reconcile stale release metadata without manual worktree recreation.
Worktree cleanup happens only after durable release/archive state is recorded, or cleanup is delayed/queued when needed to preserve recovery context.
Archive terminal report or command guidance includes a clear “continue from main/default-branch checkout” instruction after successful cleanup; no hard Warp API dependency.
Healthy archive paths remain idempotent and do not double-merge, double-push, or weaken linked-issue closure safeguards.
Targeted regression tests, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, and full `pnpm test` pass.
Do not mark release complete without structural Phase 9 evidence.
Do not use direct ADV state-file edits or Temporal DB surgery.
Preserve signal/query-only change workflow architecture; no `defineUpdate` reintroduction.
Keep task-completion semantics out of scope because another agent owns `fixTaskCompletion` / `fixCompletionSemantics`.
Do not couple correctness to Warp or any terminal-specific navigation feature.
Warp endpoint smoke failures unrelated to post-archive wayfinding.
New release modes beyond existing direct/PR archive modes.

rows.evidence: change.archive-phase9.test.ts verifies release gate signal after Phase 9 and before store.changes.save; output releaseGate done. Full pnpm test passed after review remediation.
rows.notes: Archive-owned release completion before archived status.

rows.evidence: Blocked-finalization tests assert no release signal/status save/issue closure when Phase 9 blocks; no-worktree missing-push test blocks. Git finalization helpers verify reachability/push.
Existing-bundle/no-worktree retry test verifies main-checkout evidence path; workflow-completed and mid-poll WorkflowNotFoundError tests verify disk-projection release recovery.
rows.notes: Retry does not require rematerialized worktree when bundle/evidence already exist.

rows.evidence: change.ts orders release gate, status save, then removeChangeDir/advWorktreeCleanup; tests assert save is not called on blocked finalization/release gate. Cleanup errors are warning-only after durable state.
rows.notes: Recovery context preserved until durable state exists.

rows.evidence: adv-autonomy-quality-assets.test.ts and change.archive-phase9.test.ts verify Continue from main/default guidance and continueFrom output. Docs state terminal-neutral/no Warp dependency.
rows.notes: Wayfinding is output guidance, not CWD mutation.

rows.evidence: Existing-bundle path skips archiveChange/finalizeRelease; already-done release gate skips signal. finalizeRelease/gate tests cover already-reachable and push safeguards; close issue remains after durable state.
Post-review verification passed: targeted archive recovery tests, pnpm run check, pnpm run build, full pnpm test, and adv_change_validate strict:true with expected NO_DELTAS warning.
completeReleaseGateAfterFinalization rejects statuses other than shipped/pr_pushed; verifyReleaseEvidenceFromMain requires reachability and push checks before release recovery.
rows.notes: No release completion without structural Phase 9 evidence.

rows.evidence: No manual ADV state-file edits or Temporal DB access. Recovery uses typed storage helper saveChange only inside _recovery-writers with required authorization reason/evidence.
rows.notes: Disk-projection bypass is structurally guarded and limited to completed/poisoned workflow recovery.

rows.evidence: Release gate normal path uses gateCompletedSignal/querySignal/fireSignalAndRefresh; no defineUpdate references introduced. Existing workflow-bundle boundary tests passed.
Touched code did not modify task completion semantics; task status logic remained out of scope. Review remediation used checkpoint only for git cleanliness.
rows.notes: Task-completion semantics left to separate change.

rows.evidence: continueFrom is terminal-neutral {path, branch}; docs explicitly say correctness does not depend on Warp or terminal navigation APIs.
No broad archive workflow rewrite performed; changes were localized to archive Phase 9 ordering/recovery/docs/tests.
No Warp endpoint smoke behavior changed; only terminal-neutral wayfinding docs/output were updated.
No new release modes added; existing direct/PR archive modes retained.

acceptanceCriteria: `adv_change_archive phase9:"run"` completes an auto-managed change with both `change.status === "archived"` and `gates.release.status === "done"`.
Release completion is recorded only after Phase 9 reachability/push evidence exists; missing merge or missing push still blocks.
Retrying archive after a completed workflow or already-written archive bundle can reconcile stale release metadata without manual worktree recreation.
Worktree cleanup happens only after durable release/archive state is recorded, or cleanup is delayed/queued when needed to preserve recovery context.
Archive terminal report or command guidance includes a clear “continue from main/default-branch checkout” instruction after successful cleanup; no hard Warp API dependency.
Healthy archive paths remain idempotent and do not double-merge, double-push, or weaken linked-issue closure safeguards.
Targeted regression tests, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, and full `pnpm test` pass.
